node_binding_hints: 01/assets/characters/c024ae01.png -> PLACEHOLDER_YOUNG_SOLDIER_IMAGE_NODE -> PLACEHOLDER_CHARACTER_IPADAPTER_NODE, suggested low weight 0.25-0.30 from 55% to 100% of SH001 only

01/assets/characters/c004e01.png -> PLACEHOLDER_XUE_LINQIANG_IMAGE_NODE -> PLACEHOLDER_CHARACTER_IPADAPTER_NODE, optional low weight 0.20-0.25 from 65% to 100% only if Xue is visible in the SH001 tail frame
assets/props/p017m.png -> PLACEHOLDER_SUMING_FLAG_MASTER_IMAGE_NODE -> PLACEHOLDER_FLAG_REFERENCE_NODE, low weight or line/control reference for wall-hung defender banners only
comfyui_node_chain: Load Image r001e01.png -> Image Resize/Crop 16:9 -> Wan first-last-frame video node 起始图像
Load Image r002e01.png -> Image Resize/Crop 16:9 -> Wan first-last-frame video node 结束图像
If the Wan node exposes clip_vision_start_image / clip_vision_end_image sockets, send the same resized start/end images through the matching CLIP Vision Encode path before connecting those sockets.
CLIP Text Encode positive / negative -> Wan first-last-frame video node 正向 / 负向
VAE -> Wan first-last-frame video node vae
Wan first-last-frame video node 正向 / 负向 / latent -> KSampler Advanced positive / negative / latent_image
Checkpoint / LoRA model -> required ModelSamplingSD3 shift node -> Character IPAdapter/reference node -> Beast IPAdapter/reference node -> KSampler Advanced model
Character references must be connected before KSampler, not after VAE Decode or Create Video.
KSampler Advanced latent -> VAE Decode latent
VAE Decode image sequence -> Create Video images
Create Video video -> Save Video video

parameter_defaults.resolution: 1280x720 production, 960x544 preview if VRAM is limited; do not use 640x640 for this 16:9 shot

wan_first_last_frame_video_node.operator_note: If this Wan build requires 4n+1 frame counts, use length 85 at fps 24 for a 3.54s render rather than falling back to 81 frames at 16fps.

parameter_defaults.cfg_range_note: Use 4.0 for first tests; raise only to 4.5 if prompt adherence is weak. Higher CFG can damage first/last-frame continuity.

character_reference_weights.operator_note: SH001 character references are tail-frame continuity only. Keep them lower than first/last-frame constraints; disable E01_C004 unless Xue is visibly present in the tail frame.

beast_reference_weights.operator_note: ComfyUI cannot read image file names from prompt text. These three references must be loaded through image nodes and connected to the configured reference/IPAdapter branch.

camera_direction_lock.path: attacker-side centered exterior low push toward the same blackstone gate
camera_direction_lock.landing: closer exterior gate-impact endpoint at the same gate, with gatehouse bell sound only and no required visible bell
camera_direction_lock.view_direction: still looking from the exterior siege side toward the same wall and gate, preserving centered epic pressure and real depth
forbidden: crossing over the wall crown to view the city or rear side
turning the wall into a horizontal barrier attacked from both sides
showing beast attackers inside the wall
making rear-wall thickness the main view
forcing a visible bell or bell frame into SH001 as a hard requirement

sc002_sh004.cfg_range_note: Start around 4.5; keep first/last-frame continuity stronger than action extrapolation.
sc002_sh004.c018_reference_rule: Use C018 at low support weight for armed route-blocking perimeter only; first/last frames remain strongest.

flag_reference_weights.operator_note: Use only to lock wall-hung defender banner emblem language. Do not let it replace scene composition or create large foreground flags.

sc002_required_inputs: optional slave-soldier and prop references c017e01/p008e01 below first/last-frame strength
SC002-SH004 pure insect armed perimeter reference c018e01 below first/last-frame strength
sc002_node_binding_hints: Use the same rear-threshold composition across first and last frame; cart leaves laterally and the camera does not chase.
c017e01/p008e01 references are supporting identity/material inputs only, lower than first/last frames.
SC002-SH004 c018e01 -> PLACEHOLDER_CHARACTER_REFERENCE_NODE -> PLACEHOLDER_REFERENCE_OR_IPADAPTER_BRANCH, low weight 0.28, preserve armed route-blocking silhouettes without overriding r008/r009

node_binding_hints: assets/characters/c020m.png -> PLACEHOLDER_BEAST_TROOP_MASTER_IMAGE_NODE -> PLACEHOLDER_BEAST_IPADAPTER_NODE, suggested weight 0.35 when beast troops are background-only
assets/characters/c021m.png -> PLACEHOLDER_COMPANION_BEAST_MASTER_IMAGE_NODE -> PLACEHOLDER_BEAST_IPADAPTER_NODE, suggested weight 0.30 when companion beasts are background-only
01/assets/characters/c020e01.png -> PLACEHOLDER_EPISODE_BEAST_STATE_IMAGE_NODE -> PLACEHOLDER_BEAST_IPADAPTER_NODE, suggested weight 0.40 when beast troops are background-only

beast_reference_weights.operator_note: For SH002 and SH003 these references are background continuity only; keep them lower than the human identity/first-frame reference.

sc002.cfg_range_note: Start around 5.0; lower if I2V frame adherence or skin/hand stability degrades.
sc002.c018_reference_rule: Use C018 at low support weight for armed perimeter guards only. Primary I2V frame remains the strongest control.

sc002_required_inputs: positive_prompt_zh_or_en from SC002 sections in comfyui-render-prompts.md
negative_prompt_zh_or_en from SC002 sections in comfyui-render-prompts.md
optional character references c016be01/c017e01/c023e01 as identity/material references only
optional pure insect armed perimeter reference c018e01 as body-scale/weapon-role reference only
sc002_node_binding_hints: c016be01/c017e01/c023e01 -> PLACEHOLDER_CHARACTER_REFERENCE_NODE -> PLACEHOLDER_REFERENCE_OR_IPADAPTER_BRANCH, lower than I2V first frame
p003e01/p008e01 -> PLACEHOLDER_PROP_REFERENCE_NODE, line-control/material only; no readable text generation
c018e01 -> PLACEHOLDER_CHARACTER_REFERENCE_NODE -> PLACEHOLDER_REFERENCE_OR_IPADAPTER_BRANCH, low weight 0.28, only for pure insect armed route-blocking scale; never for wrist grip or register work

image_node_bindings.operator_note: Disable unless Xue Linqiang is visibly present in the SH001 tail frame.
Use to constrain visible wall-hung defender banners to P017 black-sun white-wing Suming flags; do not create extra foreground flags.

parameter_profile.motion: controlled centered exterior low push toward the same gate, slight tilt-up, stronger first gate impact and gatehouse bell sound; visible bell body or bell frame is not required; no 90-degree turn, no rear/opposite-side reveal, no both-side attack reading, no wall pass-through, no 180-degree turn

Gatehouse bell is audio-only for SH001, so visible bell or bell frame is not required in R001/R002.

parameter_profile.motion: 斜上俯角桌面特写，南缘在下方前景、北境在上方深处。运镜是低速真实前推，不旋转地图、不升空、不横摇搜索；跟焦只做一次，从南缘线钉到北境水滴。红线始终是物理绳线和政治压力，不变成导航线。 / Overhead-oblique tabletop close-up, with the southern edge in the lower foreground and the northern border receding upward. Use a slow real-time push only: no map rotation, no crane-up, no searching pan. Make a single focus pull from the southern pin to the northern rain dot. The cord remains physical rope and political pressure, never a navigation line.

parameter_profile.motion: 低桌沿锁镜，不追脸、不推成肖像、不做华丽揭面。只允许一次极轻微跟焦和人物呼吸微动；台词由音频/字幕完成，视频只表现弱口部状态和下颌克制，不生成精确口型文字。 / Locked low table-edge frame: do not chase faces, turn into a portrait, or glamorously reveal Yan. Allow only one very small focus shift and breath-level body motion. Dialogue is handled by audio/subtitles; video only shows weak speaking state and restrained jaw motion, never exact lip-text generation.

parameter_profile.motion: 桌面高度极小幅推进，终点落在“指尖没有接触血牒”的空隙。推进后保持静止，只允许火光、雨影、纸边停顿和呼吸微动；动作因果必须清楚，血牒不能漂浮，手不能突然跳变。 / Use a tiny table-height push whose endpoint is the gap where the fingertips do not touch the genealogy. After the push, hold still; allow only fire flicker, rain shadow, paper-edge settling and breath micro-motion. Action causality must stay clear: the genealogy cannot float and hands cannot jump.

parameter_profile.motion: 本轮按 R013 做 I2V 转场首镜，而不是强制 R013->R014 的 FLF2V。运镜是贴近地图的短匹配移动，线条方向为后续剪辑保留；不做梦幻溶解、不全黑、不出现皇座或村口完整画面。若后续要 FLF2V，必须先确认/重做正确的封锁线终帧，再接入尾帧节点。 / For this pass, use R013 as an I2V transition-start shot, not a forced R013-to-R014 FLF2V. The camera performs a short map-level match move, preserving line direction for a later edit. No dreamy dissolve, no full black, no throne vision, no complete village-gate image inside this shot. If a later FLF2V pass is needed, first approve or rebuild a correct blockade-line last frame before connecting it to the last-frame node.

shots.optional_transition_target_note: Use only for a later approved match-cut or FLF2V tail test; this I2V pass must stay in the red-line room.
